title: helianthus exilis
intro: Helianthus exilis is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, commonly known as the tiny sunflower or dwarf sunflower. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus exilis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Helianthus exilis can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and encapsulating the plant material for later use.
